title: AAL Smart Alarm
description: This function block enables intelligent detection of emergency situations. If an individual is in need of help (e.g. after falling), help can be contacted quickly. In addition, a manual alarm is available, e.g. via an emergency button or other alarm logic. Loxone products such as the Motion Sensor Tree can easily be selected via a configuration dialog (double-click on the block).

inputs.description: Triggers the alarm. Connect an emergency button or other alarm logic here. The name of the connected sensor is used in the user interface.
Pulse: Outputs are reset / switched off. On: Block is locked. Dominating input. The name of the connected sensor is used in the user interface.
Intelligent detection of emergency situations is disabled when 1. Can be used when the home is left. A manual alarm through input (A) is still possible.

outputs.description: Level 1 is activated immediately upon alarm triggering. Level 2 is activated after the delay set on parameter D.
Intelligent API based connector. API Commands

parameters.description: If no further movement is detected within this time after the last movement in a transit room, the alarm is triggered.
If no further movement is detected within this time after the last movement in a common room, the alarm is triggered.
If no further movement is detected within this time after the last movement in a bedroom, the alarm is triggered.

properties.description: Configure devices here for automatic use as detectors in the block (e.g. Presence Sensor Tree). Sensors without an assigned room, or with a room of the types Other or Central are ignored in the intelligent detection of emergency situations and marked grey in the dialogue.
